name: Liliraune TF / Transformation / Immobile
description:
(CW: Liliraune transformation, Immobile)
Whilst hiking, you stumble upon this mysterious flower, just sitting there oozing fragrant sap.
You can't help it... Your curiosity is overwhelming! Of course, once you drink it, you might find yourself feeling a lot more green and immobile than you remember...
creator: Orbital_Lithium
